heading: Restoration to former grade: warrant officers and enlisted members
label: 8335 Restoration to former grade: warrant officers and enlisted members
text: Each retired warrant officer or enlisted member of the naval service who has been advanced on the retired list to a higher commissioned grade under , and who applies to the Secretary of the Navy within three months after his advancement, shall, if the Secretary approves, be restored on the retired list to his former warrant officer or enlisted status, as the case may be.section 8334 of this title
notes: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section and substituted “section 8334” for “section 6334”.Pub. L. 115–232section 6335 of this title

Effective Date of 2018 AmendmentAmendment by effective , with provision for the coordination of amendments and special rule for certain redesignations, see , set out as a note preceding .Pub. L. 115–232section 800 of Pub. L. 115–232section 3001 of this titleFeb. 1, 2019
